title: Systematic Review Protocol for the "Pathogens in Foods" Database: Occurrence of parasites of public health importance in fishery products
author: Kooh, Pauline
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is the protocol for conducting systematic reviews aimed at identifying and extracting information and data on the occurrence of the selected parasites in fishery products. Such protocol is employed to periodically update the web application  Pathogens in Foods  ( https://pif.esa.ipb.pt/ ) through a dedicated database insertion system ( https://pathogens-in-food-frontend.vercel.app/ ).
steps_raw: This is the protocol for conducting systematic reviews aimed at identifying and extracting information and data on the occurrence of the selected parasites in fishery products. Such protocol is employed to periodically update the web application  Pathogens in Foods  ( https://pif.esa.ipb.pt/ ) through a dedicated database insertion system ( https://pathogens-in-food-frontend.vercel.app/ ).
